name: Bertie Beetle 10g
short_description:
Bertie Beetle 10g – Australia’s Most Iconic Edible Insects!

Experience the delightful crunch and rich chocolate flavour of Bertie Beetles, the beloved Australian treat that’s been bringing smiles since 1993. These charming little chocolate-covered beetles offer a uniquely satisfying texture – crispy on the outside with a smooth, creamy chocolate coating that melts beautifully on your tongue.

What makes Bertie Beetles so special? Each 10g piece delivers an unexpected textural adventure that keeps taste buds intrigued. The combination of crunchy insect body and premium chocolate creates a perfect balance of playful fun and genuine deliciousness.

Perfect for Every Occasion:

Throw an unforgettable party with Bertie Beetles as your quirky conversation starter – guests will love the fun factor! These eye-catching treats make fantastic gifts for chocolate lovers and adventure seekers who appreciate Australia’s unique confectionery culture. Toss a few into your school lunchbox for a memorable mid-day pick-me-up that’ll have your classmates talking.

SweetsWorld Australia proudly stocks authentic Bertie Beetles, bringing you genuine Australian candy magic in every bite. Discover why these cheeky little creatures have become a national treasure!
